languages.text: "Как на Заркове, где любая ошибка стоит жизни. Только здесь — души. Бог-Император милосердный, теперь я даже чувствую жалость к тем, кто стали рабами Архиврага. Зато понимаю, как важно защищать людей от их собственных ошибок".

"Like on Zarkov, where a single mistake costs lives. Only here, it is souls. The Merciful God-Emperor, now I even feel pity for those who have fallen in thrall to the Archenemy. But I also know how important it is to protect people from their own mistakes."
languages.original_text: "Как на Заркове, где любая ошибка стоит жизни. Только здесь — души. Бог-Император милосердный, теперь я даже чувствую жалость к тем, кто стали рабами Архиврага. Зато понимаю, как важно защищать людей от их собственных ошибок".

traits.locale_text: "Like on Zarkov, where a single mistake costs lives. Only here, it is souls. The Merciful God-Emperor, now I even feel pity for those who have fallen in thrall to the Archenemy. But I also know how important it is to protect people from their own mistakes."

"Like on Zarkov, where a single mistake costs lives. Only here, it is souls. The Merciful God-Emperor, now I even feel pity for those who have fallen in thrall to the Archenemy. But I also know how important it is to protect people from their own mistakes."

"Like on Zarkov, where a single mistake costs lives. Only here, it is souls. The Merciful God-Emperor, now I even feel pity for those who have fallen in thrall to the Archenemy. But I also know how important it is to protect people from their own mistakes."

languages.text: 「ザルコフのように、1つのミスが命を奪う。ここでは魂を奪う。慈悲深い神皇帝、今では敵に操られた者たちさえ哀れに思えてくる。だが、人々を自らのミスから守ることの重要性も知っている」
languages.original_text: "Like on Zarkov, where a single mistake costs lives. Only here, it is souls. The Merciful God-Emperor, now I even feel pity for those who have fallen in thrall to the Archenemy. But I also know how important it is to protect people from their own mistakes."

languages.text: "Tek bir hatanın canlara mal olduğu Zarkov'daki gibi. Sadece burada bedel ruhlar. Merhametli Tanrı İmparator, şimdi Şerbaşı'nın kölesi olanlara bile acıyorum. Fakat insanları kendi hatalarından korumanın ne kadar önemli olduğunu da biliyorum."
languages.original_text: "Like on Zarkov, where a single mistake costs lives. Only here, it is souls. The Merciful God-Emperor, now I even feel pity for those who have fallen in thrall to the Archenemy. But I also know how important it is to protect people from their own mistakes."

traits.locale_text: "Tek bir hatanın canlara mal olduğu Zarkov'daki gibi. Sadece burada bedel ruhlar. Merhametli Tanrı İmparator, şimdi Şerbaşı'nın kölesi olanlara bile acıyorum. Fakat insanları kendi hatalarından korumanın ne kadar önemli olduğunu da biliyorum."

languages.text: “就像在扎尔科夫，一次失误就足以丧命。只不过在这里，代价是灵魂。仁慈的神皇啊，我如今甚至怜悯那些沦为大敌奴仆的人了。但我也知道，保护人们免受自身错误之害有多么重要。”
languages.original_text: "Like on Zarkov, where a single mistake costs lives. Only here, it is souls. The Merciful God-Emperor, now I even feel pity for those who have fallen in thrall to the Archenemy. But I also know how important it is to protect people from their own mistakes."

traits.locale_text: “就像在扎尔科夫，一次失误就足以丧命。只不过在这里，代价是灵魂。仁慈的神皇啊，我如今甚至怜悯那些沦为大敌奴仆的人了。但我也知道，保护人们免受自身错误之害有多么重要。”

languages.text: "Wie auf Zarkov, wo ein einziger Fehler Leben kostet. Nur, dass es hier Seelen sind. Gnädiger Gottimperator. Jetzt empfinde ich sogar für jene Mitleid, die dem Erzfeind verfallen sind. Aber ich weiß auch, wie wichtig es ist, Menschen vor ihren eigenen Fehlern zu schützen."
languages.original_text: "Like on Zarkov, where a single mistake costs lives. Only here, it is souls. The Merciful God-Emperor, now I even feel pity for those who have fallen in thrall to the Archenemy. But I also know how important it is to protect people from their own mistakes."

traits.locale_text: "Wie auf Zarkov, wo ein einziger Fehler Leben kostet. Nur, dass es hier Seelen sind. Gnädiger Gottimperator. Jetzt empfinde ich sogar für jene Mitleid, die dem Erzfeind verfallen sind. Aber ich weiß auch, wie wichtig es ist, Menschen vor ihren eigenen Fehlern zu schützen."

languages.text: « Comme sur Zarkov, la moindre erreur peut avoir des conséquences fatales. Sauf qu'ici, ce n'est pas sa vie qu'on perd, mais son âme. L'Empereur-Dieu est miséricorde, et désormais, je ressens même de la pitié pour ceux qui sont tombés sous l'emprise du Grand Ennemi. Mais je sais combien il est important de protéger les braves gens de leurs propres erreurs. »
languages.original_text: "Like on Zarkov, where a single mistake costs lives. Only here, it is souls. The Merciful God-Emperor, now I even feel pity for those who have fallen in thrall to the Archenemy. But I also know how important it is to protect people from their own mistakes."

traits.locale_text: « Comme sur Zarkov, la moindre erreur peut avoir des conséquences fatales. Sauf qu'ici, ce n'est pas sa vie qu'on perd, mais son âme. L'Empereur-Dieu est miséricorde, et désormais, je ressens même de la pitié pour ceux qui sont tombés sous l'emprise du Grand Ennemi. Mais je sais combien il est important de protéger les braves gens de leurs propres erreurs. »

languages.text: «Al igual que en Zarkov, los errores se pagan en vidas, solo que aquí el precio lo pagan las almas. Dios Emperador misericordioso, ahora siento lástima por los esclavos del Archienemigo. Pero sé lo importante que es proteger a la gente de sus propios errores».
languages.original_text: "Like on Zarkov, where a single mistake costs lives. Only here, it is souls. The Merciful God-Emperor, now I even feel pity for those who have fallen in thrall to the Archenemy. But I also know how important it is to protect people from their own mistakes."
